compiled_state.title: Create external-dependencies-block.md contract doc
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Create plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md defining the External Dependencies block schema.

## Schema Fields (required unless noted)
- name: string — human-readable dependency name
- ownership: enum (exists | this-epic | linked-epic-<id>) — who owns the dependency
- handling: enum (claude_auto | user_manual) — how Claude should handle it
- claude_has_access: enum (yes | no | unknown) — whether Claude can verify/use it
- verification_command: string (optional) — shell command to verify access

## Content Requirements
- Define each field with type, description, and accepted values
- Include one complete example block
- Note which fields are optional
- Reference will be consumed by: brainstorm, preplanning, implementation-plan, sprint skills

## TDD Requirement (testing_mode: GREEN, Rule 5 exemption — non-executable instruction file)
Structural boundary test only. No RED test required (criterion: 'static assets only / non-executable instruction files').

## Acceptance Criteria
- Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md
- Verify: grep -q 'ownership' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md
- Verify: grep -q 'handling' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md
- Verify: grep -q 'claude_has_access' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md
- Verify: grep -q 'verification_command' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md
- Verify: grep -q 'claude_auto\|user_manual' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md
